fullCourseName: MQTT and ESP32 IoT Lab Course @ Metropolia
shortDescription: Learn Python and MQTT on a real ESP32 board with one LED, JSON commands, and MQTT verification.
fullDescription: This course introduces students to basic IoT communication through practical ESP32 laboratory assignments. Students run short MicroPython snippets, publish JSON telemetry, subscribe to MQTT command topics, parse JSON payloads, control one LED, and report the final device state. The course is structured so each lab can be verified through MQTT traffic from the real board.
requirements: Beginner-friendly. Basic familiarity with variables, functions, and loops is helpful.
